stages.title: Site Analysis
stages.narration: Stage 1. Site analysis. Amphibious houses are designed for areas that experience periodic flooding.
stages.explanation: Amphibious houses are designed for areas that experience periodic flooding.

stages.title: Setting Out
stages.narration: Stage 2. Setting out. Guide post locations and foundation pad positions are marked on the floodplain.
stages.explanation: Guide posts and foundation pads determine the future movement path of the floating structure.

stages.title: Foundation Pad Construction
stages.narration: Stage 3. Foundation pads are excavated, reinforced, and cast in concrete to anchor the amphibious system.
stages.explanation: Foundation pads anchor the floating structure and transfer forces into the ground.

stages.title: Guide Post Installation
stages.narration: Stage 4. Steel guide posts are erected and anchored into the foundation pads with alignment checks.
stages.explanation: Guide posts allow vertical movement while preventing horizontal drift.

stages.title: Floating Platform Construction
stages.narration: Stage 5. The buoyant platform frame and floating deck are assembled to support the house.
stages.explanation: The floating platform provides buoyancy and supports the entire house.

stages.title: Buoyancy Element Installation
stages.narration: Stage 6. Buoyancy drums are now installed beneath the platform. These sealed elements displace water and generate the uplift force necessary for flotation.
stages.explanation: Buoyancy elements displace water and generate uplift forces.

stages.title: Structural Frame Erection
stages.narration: Stage 7. A lightweight timber and bamboo frame is erected on the floating platform.
stages.explanation: Lightweight structural systems maximize buoyancy efficiency.

stages.title: Floor System Installation
stages.narration: Stage 8. Deck panels and moisture-resistant flooring complete the habitable floor system.
stages.explanation: The floor system distributes loads uniformly across the floating platform.

stages.title: Wall Construction
stages.narration: Stage 9. Lightweight wall panels are installed with openings formed for doors and windows.
stages.explanation: Lightweight wall systems reduce overall dead load.

stages.title: Window and Door Installation
stages.narration: Stage 10. Door and window frames are installed above expected flood levels.
stages.explanation: Openings are designed to remain above expected flood levels.

stages.title: Roof Structure
stages.narration: Stage 11. Lightweight roof trusses are assembled on the floating structure.

stages.title: Roof Covering
stages.narration: Stage 12. CGI sheets are installed and fastened to improve wind resistance.
stages.explanation: Proper roof anchorage improves wind resistance.

stages.title: Utility Connections
stages.narration: Stage 13. Flexible water, electrical, and drainage connections accommodate vertical movement during flooding.
stages.explanation: Utilities must accommodate vertical movement during flooding.

stages.title: Anchorage System
stages.narration: Stage 14. Guide collars and anchors are installed to restrain horizontal drift while allowing vertical travel.
stages.explanation: The anchorage system prevents drifting while allowing vertical movement.

stages.title: Completed Structure
stages.narration: Construction complete. The amphibious system allows the structure to rise with floodwaters while remaining anchored to its original location.
stages.explanation: Normal grounded condition ready; activates flotation during design flood events.

foundation.title: Foundation Pad
foundation.anchorageFunction: Transfers vertical and horizontal loads to bearing soil.
foundation.loadTransfer: Anchors guide posts and resists uplift during low water.

guide_post.title: Guide Post
guide_post.verticalMovement: Provides sliding guidance for collars during rise and fall.
guide_post.horizontalRestraint: Prevents lateral drift of the floating house.

buoyant_drum.title: Buoyant Drum
buoyant_drum.waterDisplacement: Sealed volume displaces water per Archimedes principle.
buoyant_drum.buoyancyGeneration: Uplift equals weight of displaced water when submerged.

floating_platform.title: Floating Platform
floating_platform.loadDistribution: Distributes house loads to buoyancy elements uniformly.
floating_platform.structuralStability: Integrates frame, deck, and drum connections.

flexible_utilities.title: Flexible Utilities
flexible_utilities.floodPerformance: Maintain services during moderate flood rise.

roof_system.title: Roof System
roof_system.weightReductionBenefits: Lightweight CGI roof minimizes dead load for buoyancy margin.
